confirmation_body: Click the link below to confirm your email address:
password_reset_body: Click the link below to reset your password:
rejection_body: Your registration at {title} was not approved at this time.
warning_warn_description: An administrator has sent a warning to your account.
warning_disable_description: An administrator has frozen your account. Login is restricted.
warning_silence_description: An administrator has limited your account. Your posts will only be visible to your followers.
warning_suspend_description: An administrator has suspended your account. You can no longer use this account.
warning_sensitive_description: An administrator has marked your media as sensitive content.
warning_none_description: An administrator has sent a warning to your account.
warning_unsuspend_description: Your account suspension has been lifted. You can use your account again.
warning_unsilence_description: The limitation on your account has been removed. Your posts are now visible to everyone again.
warning_enable_description: Your account has been reactivated. You can log in again.
warning_unsensitize_description: The sensitive content flag on your media has been removed.
